446956.name: Survival to age 65, female (% of cohort)
446956.description: Survival to age 65 refers to the percentage of a cohort of newborn infants that would survive to age 65, if subject to age specific mortality rates of the specified year.

source.name: UN Population Division (via World Bank)
source.dataPublisherSource: World Population Prospects - UN Population Division (2018)
